selection.caveat: window boundaries derive from LLM-generated timestamps; frames are canonical
transcript_excerpt: [120s-131s] The person mounts the new part onto the lathe's fixture, adjusting it into place, then threads the washer and nut onto the central rod by hand.
[131s-139s] They pick up the large wrench to tighten the nut securely. They then turn handwheels and pull a lever to engage the machine, starting the spindle and the cutting process.
[139s-149s] The lathe runs, producing smoke or mist from the cutting fluid. The person stands and observes the operation.
window_activities: thread loose washer and nut onto lathe rod
tighten lathe chuck bolts with spanner
